# Stop Biting
> An app that uses on-device AI (MediaPipe/WebAssembly) to detect nail biting (onychophagia) in real-time via webcam, then sounds an alarm. 100% private — no camera data ever leaves your device. Available as a native desktop app for Mac and Windows, and as a web app.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://stopbiting.today/): Landing page — download, features, privacy commitment
- [Blog](https://stopbiting.today/blog): Science-backed articles on nail biting, habit reversal, and onychophagia
- [Privacy Policy](https://stopbiting.today/privacy): Data handling and privacy commitment

## Blog articles

- [Why Do People Bite Their Nails?](https://stopbiting.today/blog/why-do-people-bite-their-nails): Causes, triggers, and the psychology behind onychophagia
- [Habit Reversal Training: The Complete Guide](https://stopbiting.today/blog/habit-reversal-training-guide): Evidence-based HRT technique for stopping nail biting — reduces frequency 70–90%
- [The Real Health Risks of Nail Biting](https://stopbiting.today/blog/nail-biting-health-risks): Dental damage, infections, pathogen transfer, and long-term consequences
- [Nail Biting in Children: What Parents Should Know](https://stopbiting.today/blog/nail-biting-in-children): Age-appropriate strategies and when to seek professional help
- [Best Remedies to Stop Nail Biting](https://stopbiting.today/blog/best-nail-biting-remedies): Every method ranked by evidence — from bitter polish to AI detection
- [The Stress–Nail Biting Connection](https://stopbiting.today/blog/stress-and-nail-biting): Why anxiety drives the habit and how to break the loop
- [Onychophagia and OCD: Understanding the Link](https://stopbiting.today/blog/onychophagia-ocd-connection): BFRB classification, OCD-spectrum overlap, and treatment implications
- [How AI Can Help You Stop Biting Your Nails](https://stopbiting.today/blog/how-ai-can-help-stop-nail-biting): Real-time webcam detection and the HRT awareness mechanism it automates
- [Nail Biting at Work: The Focus–Habit Loop](https://stopbiting.today/blog/nail-biting-during-focus-and-work): Why deep concentration triggers biting and how to interrupt it without losing flow
- [The Science of Breaking Any Habit](https://stopbiting.today/blog/breaking-any-habit-science): Neuroscience of habit loops and extinction applied specifically to nail biting
- [Nail Biting vs Skin Picking: BFRB Comparison](https://stopbiting.today/blog/nail-biting-vs-skin-picking): How the two most common BFRBs differ in triggers, mechanism, and treatment
- [Stopping Nail Biting for Good: Relapse Prevention](https://stopbiting.today/blog/stopping-nail-biting-for-good): Why relapse is neurologically expected and how to build lasting change
- [Nail Biting and Anxiety: Treating the Root Cause](https://stopbiting.today/blog/nail-biting-anxiety-treatment): When anxiety is the primary driver and how treating it directly reduces biting
- [How Long Does It Take to Stop Nail Biting?](https://stopbiting.today/blog/how-long-to-stop-nail-biting): Research-based realistic timeline — week-by-week what to expect
- [Why Nail Biting Persists into Adulthood](https://stopbiting.today/blog/nail-biting-adults-why-persists): Why adult habits are harder to break than childhood habits
- [Webcam App Privacy for Nail Biting](https://stopbiting.today/blog/webcam-privacy-nail-biting-app): On-device AI explained — why no camera data leaves your device
- [Nail Biting During Sleep](https://stopbiting.today/blog/nail-biting-during-sleep): Does sleep nail biting happen, how to detect it, and how to stop it
- [Bitter Nail Polish Review: Does It Work?](https://stopbiting.today/blog/bitter-nail-polish-review): Evidence review of Mavala Stop and denatonium benzoate products
- [Is Nail Biting Genetic?](https://stopbiting.today/blog/nail-biting-genetics): Twin studies and BFRB heritability research — 30–45% heritable
- [How MediaPipe AI Detection Works](https://stopbiting.today/blog/mediapipe-ai-detection-explained): Technical explainer of WebAssembly hand/face landmark detection

## Pricing

- Free trial: 7 days, no credit card required — full detection and tracking features included
- Monthly: €2.99/month
- Yearly: €29.00/year (~€2.42/month, saves 19%)
- All paid plans include unlimited AI detection, streak tracking, incident history, and all alert types

## Key facts

- Nail biting (onychophagia) affects 20–30% of adults and up to 45% of children
- Habit Reversal Training (HRT) reduces biting frequency by 70–90% in consistent practitioners
- BFRBs (body-focused repetitive behaviors) are classified in the DSM-5 under OCD-related disorders
- Stop Biting uses MediaPipe running in WebAssembly — zero network requests during detection
- Detection works fully offline after initial load; no camera data is transmitted or stored
- The app detects nail biting using hand landmark (21 keypoints) + face mesh (468 landmarks) models
- Free 7-day trial — available for macOS 12+, Windows 10+, and in the browser as a PWA
